examples: At abroad, research mainly concentrates on establishing hydrogeological model and using chemical methods to analyze chemical characteristics of springwater.
Springwater is trapped by the terraces, and then evaporates, forms clouds and falls again as rain higher up the mountain.
For a more relaxed ride, head to Springwater Corridor in the Hosford-Abernethy neighbourhood (enter the trail at Southeast 4th Avenue and Southeast Ivon Street).
